agent_type.description: List of agent types to retrieve. Defaults to `endpoint`.

alert_ids.description: If this action is associated with any alerts, they can be specified here. The action will be logged in any cases associated with the specified alerts. Max of 50.

case_ids.description: The IDs of cases where the action taken will be logged. Max of 50.

endpoint_ids.description: List of endpoint IDs (cannot contain empty strings). Max of 250.
